short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal may shift US focus
rationale: Active war remains the dominant reality for Ukrainians; the US-Iran deal uncertainty and Israeli strikes on Beirut risk further diverting US attention and resources from Ukraine support.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues — no qualitative change
top_events.summary: Active combat and infrastructure threats persist across Ukraine. No new escalation reported this cycle, but the baseline remains at maximum impact for Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal uncertainty + Israel strikes Beirut
top_events.summary: Trump's claimed Sunday signing of a US-Iran deal — disputed by Tehran — and simultaneous Israeli strikes on Beirut risk deepening US focus on the Middle East at Ukraine's expense, potentially affecting Western aid flows.

top_events.title: UK seizes Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: UK forces intercepting a Russian sanctions-evading tanker signals continued Western enforcement pressure on Russia, which is a modest positive signal for Ukraine's allies' resolve.
